metadata.title: Impact of AI on How We Learn to Code with Scott Tolinski

segments.text: I recently had the opportunity to interview one of my heroes, the one and only Scott
Talinsky.
You may know Scott is one of the co-hosts of the syntax podcast, Level Up tutorials, or
his amazing work over his century.
Now this was an awesome conversation that I got to have about how Scott sees AI evolving
education, learning to code, and so much more, so let's get into it.

Yeah.
Yeah.

Yeah.

You're like, oh, why, why did you do that?
So for me, the video thing always like just gravitated towards me.

It was, to me, was always like, I can put on a video.
I can launch somebody talk about it and do it.

time because you're getting answers that seem like they're really good.

I'm oftentimes critiquing it from like a really hyper like this to me is like not what
I would write myself.

don't know exactly what they don't know.

I'm not going to use these tools for learning or all these tools are bad.
I'm not going to use them for development.

deeply into them and explore them.

They don't work for them.
They say, this sucks.
They're like, I don't think this is worthwhile.
